## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hyperexponential and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and production updates.](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is implementing an agentic AI pipeline to improve content quality and reduce human editing needs](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [One article ready for review today, with 3 more expected by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Need for additional keyword research to target top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [David to provide product training recordings and industry analyst content to inform future articles](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1317.0)

## Topics

### Team Introduction

  - [Bailey Seybolt introduced as new managing editor leading content editing and generation](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Bailey has 10 years of B2B SaaS content experience, including recent AI services work](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

### Content Production Updates

  - [Calibration blog finalized based on previous feedback](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Standard AI pipeline getting content 70-80% there, but needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Implementing agentic AI pipeline with additional steps:](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [Research supervisor workflow](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [Prioritized question generation](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [Multiple research APIs and web scraping](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Research quality evaluation and scoring](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Addressing knowledge gaps](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Goal: Reduce repetitive information and improve content specificity](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

### Keyword and Content Strategy

  - [Mix of low volume, high intent keywords (e.g., "submission triage in insurance")](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Focusing on product feature-related content to build topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Approved topics: submission triage, underwriting workbench](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Need to balance definitional content with product positioning](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Exploring underwriting workbench sub-topics (history, types, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Aim to target different funnel stages, with more focus on top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

### Product Positioning and Content Creation

  - [HX offers decision intelligence rather than full workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Need for product marketing input to accurately position HX in relation to underwriting workbenches](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Plan to create product feature matrix and competitor comparison tables](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [David to provide product training recordings for content team reference](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1317.0)

### Content Publication and Design

  - [Awaiting design team feedback on featured image examples](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Exploring Framer integration requirements (MCP vs API)](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

### Expanding Content Ideas

  - [Need for more article topics to meet 5/week goal](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [David to share industry analyst content for potential article ideas](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [New Airtable tab created for "David's Content Suggestions"](https://fathom.video/share/F18G1txoe81a3zsJoJJ-aQShEge_z_r3?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
